title: Quantum Texture Pack
description:
offical texture pack of the Quantum server
join the discord!
body:
# Official Texture Pack of Quantum
- currently changes the main menu panorama to Quantums guardian peri decoration
- changes the "java edition" text to "Quantum Labs"
- changes splash text

## planned additions
- add multiple options for all of Quantums decorations
- add more funny splash texts
